title: cynanchum stelligerum
intro: Cynanchum stelligerum, also known as Chinese bugbane or Stellate swallowwort, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum stelligerum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum stelligerum is often used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
